Pillar4People.Barrier2: Staff don't understand what's expected of them
Pillar4People.Objective: To build a skilled team who are proud to represent the Brand and motivated to help the business achieve its objectives
Pillar4People.Strategy1: Monitor staff satisfaction and establish incentives.
Pillar4People.Strategy2: Make sure staff are clear of what is expected of them through staff handbooks, KPI's, performance reviews etc
Pillar4People.Strategy3: Set a positive example and dont tolerate individuals who behave badly and/or show a lack of respect to their colleagues.
Pillar4People.Strategy4: Monitor staff churn and have a meeting with every leaver to establish real reasons and take their comments on board for consideration.

In3YearsWeWill: We will have a strong team of loyal motivated staff that will help us build a reputation as the most reliable pest control company in Berkshire delivering effective solutions. We will have a turnover of £1m and 20% net profit with 50% of our revenue from recurring commercial works.

Pillar1FINANCE.Barrier1: Badly quoted work which doesn't make enough margin
Pillar1FINANCE.Barrier2: I am slow to invoice clients
Pillar1FINANCE.Barrier3: Client takes a long time to pay
Pillar1FINANCE.Barrier4: Spending money I haven't budgeted for
Pillar1FINANCE.Objective: To achieve gross & net profit targets,and ensure I am paid by clients so I have sufficient working capital in the bank.
Pillar1FINANCE.Strategy1: Make sure each piece of work is costed on inbervels quote calculator and allow extra time and/or materials as a buffer to error. Review quoting assumptions and adjust if persistently wrong. Make staff aware of the time that has been allowed and offer incentives if its completed early and question if it take longer.
Pillar1FINANCE.Strategy2: Be disciplined and dont wait until month end to invoice. Invoice always at the earliest opportunity.
Pillar1FINANCE.Strategy3: Invoice early and date invoice as early as possible. Introduce effective credit control process including credit checks, calling client before invoice is due to make sure it is approved and identify any hold ups early.
Pillar1FINANCE.Strategy4: Set spending budgets and be disciplined to remain within them. Get monthly management accounts.

Pillar2Operations.Barrier2: Insufficient resources available to do the work
Pillar2Operations.Barrier3: We don't have enough people with the right skills
Pillar2Operations.Objective: To carry out all works safely and in a manner that represents the Brand as efficiently as possible, so we may achieve our RPP targets
Pillar2Operations.Strategy1: Do not accept, Identify reasons and establish if these were due to the clients and if they are can the client be charged extra. Make sure the scope of work is clear to the client and staff and any deviation will be charged. Make sure staff are aware how much time is allowed and consider incentives if they finish ahead of budget.
Pillar2Operations.Strategy2: Establish contingency work force of supply partners/sub contractors who have been carefully vetted and assessed.
Pillar2Operations.Strategy3: Introduce staff development program and invest in training to ensure all staff are skilled. Motivate staff and manage staff satisfaction to avoid loosing skilled people.
Pillar2Operations.Strategy4: Champion a positive health and safety culture and audit regually

Pillar3SalesMarketing.Barrier1: Not enough time to promote the business
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Barrier2: I don't have sales and marketing skills
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Barrier3: A lack of promotional tools : website, leaflets etc
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Barrier4: No available budget to spend on promoting the business
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Objective: To create enough interest in the Brand that it generates sufficient quoting opportunities that convert into orders ( and ultimately enough revenue to enable the business to hit its financial targets).
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Strategy1: Employ the services of a marketing agency to promote the business and set targets for myself and for staff to generate leads perhaps incentivising with commission payment.
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Strategy2: Employ services of a marketing professional and obtain some training for myself.
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Strategy3: Get a web site built and create a sales strategy and set targets to maintain focus and discipline.
Pillar3SalesMarketing.Strategy4: Focus on sales activities that have little or no cost and as revenue increases set aside budget for promoting the business.
